sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63117" key="liqanaboleu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐθ-αναβολεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n63117.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">surgical instrument for extracting stone</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.110</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">100</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
